note: 44-year-old female with recurrent major depressive disorder, currently in partial remission on sertraline 100mg daily. PHQ-9 today is 8 (moderate). No suicidal ideation. Sleep and appetite improved. Plan: continue current dose, follow up in 6 weeks.
notes: Upgrades unspecified depressive episode (F32.9) to recurrent major depression in partial remission (F33.41).
